# MQD Tracker

> A free, private, browser-based tool to track Delta Air Lines Medallion Qualification Dollars (MQDs) toward Medallion status.

MQD Tracker helps Delta SkyMiles members track their progress toward Silver, Gold, Platinum, or Diamond Medallion status by monitoring Medallion Qualification Dollars (MQDs).

## What it does

- Parses Delta Account Activity PDFs client-side to extract MQD activity
- Tracks earned and pending MQDs by category, trip, and month
- Forecasts year-end MQD totals based on credit card spending and anticipated trips
- Supports all four Medallion tiers: Silver ($5,000), Gold ($10,000), Platinum ($15,000), Diamond ($28,000)
- Exports activity to CSV

## Privacy

All data processing happens in the browser. PDFs are never uploaded to any server. No data is stored — everything is cleared when the page is closed. Vercel Analytics is used for anonymous page view counting only.

## Tech

React 19, TypeScript, Vite, pdf.js. Deployed on Vercel.

## Not affiliated with Delta

This tool is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to Delta Air Lines, Inc.
